seoTitle: Djiru vs Djuan — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Djiru and Djuan. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Djiru and Djuan.
heading: Djiru vs Djuan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Djiru, Queensland and Djuan, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Djiru has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Djuan (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Djiru or Djuan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Djiru has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Djuan scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Djiru scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Djuan scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Djiru or Djuan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Djiru has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
